title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 028
task1_desc: Write a script to check the file content without explicitly reading the content. It should accept file name with path as command line argument and print **"The file content is binary."** or else **"The file content is ascii."** accordingly.
task1_body: Write a script to check the file content without explicitly reading the content. It should accept file name with path as command line argument and print **"The file content is binary."** or else **"The file content is ascii."** accordingly.
task2_desc: Write a script to display **Digital Clock**. Feel free to be as creative as you can when displaying digits. We expect bare minimum something like **"14:10:11"**.
task2_body:
Write a script to display **Digital Clock**. Feel free to be as creative as you can when displaying digits. We expect bare minimum something like **"14:10:11"**.

Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 6th October 2019**.
